subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth. Verily, it guideth all unto God, the Lord of the worlds. He that hath hearkened unto My call and spoken [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق انه یهدی الکل الی الله رب العالمین ان الذی سمع ندائی و نطق
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
